name: revit_create_3d_view_from_sheet_click
description: Creates a perspective 3D view with its camera at a sheet click mapped through viewport transforms into model space.

viewport_id.description: Viewport element id on the active sheet

sheet_x.description: X coordinate of the click in sheet space

sheet_y.description: Y coordinate of the click in sheet space

notes: MakeView3D.MakeFromViewportClick contains the logic; replace PickPoint with supplied coordinates.
